title: Celebrate Congresswoman Mary Peltola
summary: What: A special reception to celebrate Congresswoman Mary Peltola becoming the first Alaska Native in Congress – hors d’oeuvres will be served. Where: Kimpton Hotel Monaco, Paris Ballroom, 700 F Street NW, Washington, DC 20004 When: September 13, 2022 – 7:00 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time Proudly hosted...

title: 2022 fire season winding down
summary: Cool and wet weather patterns in August brought the unusual 2022 fire season to an end in much of the state. Acreage burned and the number of total fires increased only moderately over the last weeks. However, dry conditions persist in parts of the Interior and late season lightning caused several new fires in August, leading to evacuations around Delta Junctio...

title: A Titan of the Tax Code, A Lasting Legacy for Wild Alaska
summary: The entire Alaska Wilderness League family was saddened to learn of Tom Troyer’s passing in May of 2022.
